title: Dashboard
subtitle: Keep the BG Defender catalog organized and jump into the next admin action.
coursesSubtitle: Create, review, and prepare courses before moving into chapters, subchapters, and content editing.
coursesListDescription: A simple view of every course, with its status, access level, authors, and structure size.
emptyCoursesDescription: As soon as courses exist, they will appear here for admin review.
recentCoursesDescription: A quick view of the latest courses before we build the full management table.

create.title: Create a new course
create.subtitle: Set up the course shell first. We will handle chapters, subchapters, and rich content right after this step.
create.detailsDescription: This information feeds the course overview and the main catalog cards.
create.descriptionEnPlaceholder: Write the English course overview shown on the overview tab.
create.descriptionFiPlaceholder: Write the Finnish course overview shown on the overview tab.
create.durationDescription: Enter the total number of minutes. Leave this empty if you do not want to show a duration on the course page.
create.coverUploadHint: JPG, PNG, or WEBP up to 5 MB.
create.authorsDescription: Select one or more authors that should appear on the course overview.
create.titleRequired: Both English and Finnish titles are required.
create.descriptionRequired: Both English and Finnish descriptions are required.
create.durationInvalid: Estimated duration must be greater than zero.
create.success: Course created successfully. Redirecting to course management...

edit.title: Edit course
edit.subtitle: Update the course shell before moving into chapters, subchapters, and content editing.
edit.detailsDescription: Update the course overview, metadata, cover image, and author assignment.
edit.success: Course updated successfully. Redirecting to course management...

chapters.title: Chapters
chapters.description: Build the course structure here first. We will add subchapters and lesson content right after this step.
chapters.libraryDescription: Review order, update titles, or remove a chapter.
chapters.emptyDescription: Create the first chapter and it will appear here as the start of the course structure.
chapters.formDescription: Add the chapter shell now. Subchapters will be the next step right after this one.
chapters.orderHint: Existing chapters are shifted automatically to keep the order unique.
chapters.deleteConfirm: Delete this chapter? This action cannot be undone.
chapters.titleRequired: Both English and Finnish chapter titles are required.
chapters.descriptionRequired: Both English and Finnish chapter descriptions are required.
chapters.orderInvalid: Chapter order must be a number greater than zero.

subchapters.title: Subchapters
subchapters.description: Create the lesson shells inside each chapter before we move into the real lesson content editor.
subchapters.emptyWithoutChapterDescription: Subchapters live inside chapters, so start by creating at least one chapter above.
subchapters.libraryDescription: Browse subchapters grouped by chapter, then edit or delete the one you want to update.
subchapters.emptyTitle: No subchapters in this chapter yet.
subchapters.formDescription: Attach the subchapter to a chapter, then we will plug real lesson content into it next.
subchapters.parentHint: This subchapter will be saved inside
subchapters.parentRequired: Choose a chapter before creating a subchapter.
subchapters.orderHint: Existing subchapters are shifted automatically to keep the order unique.
subchapters.deleteConfirm: Delete this subchapter? This action cannot be undone.
subchapters.titleRequired: Both English and Finnish subchapter titles are required.
subchapters.descriptionRequired: Both English and Finnish subchapter descriptions are required.
subchapters.orderInvalid: Subchapter order must be a number greater than zero.

contentBlocks.title: Content blocks
contentBlocks.description: Build the lesson blocks inside each subchapter now. We will replace the plain text area with TipTap right after this step.
contentBlocks.workspaceSubtitle: Pick a subchapter on the left and manage its lesson blocks from this focused content workspace.
contentBlocks.emptyWithoutSubChapterDescription: Content blocks live inside subchapters, so add at least one subchapter above before creating lesson content.
contentBlocks.libraryDescription: Review blocks grouped by subchapter, then edit or delete the one you want to update.
contentBlocks.emptyTitle: No content blocks in this subchapter yet.
contentBlocks.formDescription: Choose the lesson block you want to work on, then edit its content here. This is where the rich text editor will live for text blocks.
contentBlocks.editingHint: Keep the structure on the left, and use this panel as the focused editor for the selected block.
contentBlocks.parentHint: This block will be saved inside
contentBlocks.parentRequired: Choose a subchapter before creating a content block.
contentBlocks.contentEnPlaceholder: Write the English lesson content here. This panel will become the rich text editor for text blocks.
contentBlocks.contentFiPlaceholder: Write the Finnish lesson content here. This panel will become the rich text editor for text blocks.
contentBlocks.urlPlaceholder: Paste the URL for video, image, link, or PDF blocks.
contentBlocks.deleteConfirm: Delete this content block? This action cannot be undone.
contentBlocks.titleRequired: Both English and Finnish block titles are required.
contentBlocks.contentRequired: Both English and Finnish block contents are required for this type.
contentBlocks.urlRequired: A URL is required for this block type.
contentBlocks.orderInvalid: Block order must be a number greater than zero.
contentBlocks.noPreview: This block does not have preview text yet.

quiz.title: Chapter training quizzes
quiz.subtitle: Attach one scored training quiz to each chapter. These quizzes can include single-choice and multiple-choice questions with a passing percentage.
quiz.description: Pick a chapter on the left, then create or update the scored training quiz learners will see at the end of that chapter.
quiz.deleteConfirm: Delete this training quiz? This action cannot be undone.
quiz.chapterListDescription: Choose the chapter whose training quiz you want to manage.
quiz.editorDescription: Configure the scored quiz for the selected chapter, including the pass percentage and the full question set.
quiz.publishNow: Make this quiz visible to learners now
quiz.selectChapterDescription: Choose a chapter from the left sidebar to manage its training quiz.

finalTest.title: Course final test
finalTest.subtitle: Create one optional scored final test for the full course. Learners unlock it only after finishing the course path.
finalTest.description: Configure the optional final assessment for this course, including its passing percentage and question set.
finalTest.failedToLoad: Failed to load the final test.
finalTest.saveFailed: Failed to save the final test.
finalTest.deleteConfirm: Delete this final test? This action cannot be undone.
finalTest.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the final test.
finalTest.publishNow: Make this final test visible to learners now

authors.title: Manage authors
authors.subtitle: Create and maintain reusable author profiles so you can attach them to any course whenever you need.
authors.formDescription: Keep author information ready once so you can reuse it across all courses.
authors.listDescription: Every author you create here becomes reusable across all course forms.
authors.searchPlaceholder: Search authors by name, role, or biography
authors.searchEmptyDescription: Try another name, role, or biography keyword.
authors.name: Name
authors.photoUploadCta: Choose an author photo to upload
authors.photoUploadHint: JPG, PNG, or WEBP up to 5 MB.
authors.biographyEnPlaceholder: Write a short English biography for this author.
authors.biographyFiPlaceholder: Write a short Finnish biography for this author.
authors.deleteConfirm: Delete this author? This action cannot be undone.
authors.emptyDescription: Create the first author profile and it will be ready for course assignment right away.

users.title: Manage users
users.subtitle: Manage access plans, creator permissions, and account status from one simple admin space.
users.empty: No users match the current filters.
users.deleteConfirm: Delete this user account permanently? This action cannot be undone.

collections.title: Manage collections
collections.subtitle: Create custom learner sections, give them the title you want, and decide exactly which published courses should appear inside each collection.
collections.formDescription: Build custom course groups for the learner home, then control their title, order, and visibility from one place.
collections.coverUploadCta: Choose a collection image to upload
collections.coverUploadHint: JPG, PNG, or WEBP up to 5 MB.
collections.coverUploadFailed: Failed to upload collection cover image.
collections.visibilityPublished: Show this collection on the learner home
collections.availableCoursesHint: Pick the published courses you want to feature inside this collection.
collections.selectedCoursesHint: Adjust the order here. The learner home will show the courses in this same sequence.
collections.noSelectedCoursesHint: Choose at least one published course from the left panel.
collections.listDescription: Review all custom sections, update their visibility, and keep the learner home curated the way you want.
collections.emptyDescription: Create the first curated section and it will be ready for the learner home right away.
collections.titleRequired: Both English and Finnish titles are required.

resources.title: Manage resources
resources.subtitle: Send private documents or links to a specific user, and keep a clean record of what has already been shared.
resources.formDescription: Choose a user, then attach a document or link that should appear in their private resource space.
resources.resourceDescriptionPlaceholder: Add a short note so the user understands why this resource matters.
resources.uploadHelper: Supported: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, TXT, or CSV up to 15 MB.
resources.validationRequired: Title and target user are required.
resources.validationFile: Upload a document before saving this resource.
resources.validationLink: Add a link before saving this resource.
resources.listDescription: Review the private documents and links already assigned to users from the admin space.
resources.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, description, or user email
resources.emptyDescription: Send the first private document or link and it will appear here for admin follow-up.

courseActions.deleteConfirm: Delete this course permanently? This action cannot be undone.
